case_title: JOSE MARIO HERNANDEZ VS. ANNA LUCCHESI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, JOSE MARIO AS TO DEFENDANT LUCCHESI, ANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JOSE MARIO HERNANDEZ, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPERTER, VICTOR MARTINEZ, #300740, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANNA LUCCHESI IS PRESENT. JOHNNY MARENCO TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2021 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON JUNE 8, 2021)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, JOSE MARIO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, JOSE MARIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUCCHESI, ANNA $533.33 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $533.33 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUCCHESI, ANNA
